primary_sources.source_name: RBI Report on Non-Banking Financial Companies 2023-24
primary_sources.notes: RBI NBFC Supervision Report: aggregate OpEx/NII ratios, staff cost benchmarks for deposit-taking and non-deposit NBFCs.
Revenue ~₹4,300 Cr, employee expenses ~₹600 Cr (13.9%), total opex ~₹1,200 Cr (27.9% of revenue). India's largest AMC.

primary_sources.source_name: Nippon Life India AMC FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 540767)
primary_sources.notes: Profitability metrics and cost structure for mid-sized AMC.
India's largest NBFC. Opex/NII ratio, employee costs, credit costs disclosed. Total expenses ~₹22,000 Cr on NII ~₹28,000 Cr.

primary_sources.source_name: AMFI Monthly Data — Mutual Fund Industry Statistics FY25
primary_sources.notes: AUM-weighted expense ratios and operational cost benchmarks for Indian mutual fund industry.

source_metadata.methodology: P25/P50/P75 derived from FY24-25 financial disclosures of 5 India-listed NBFCs and AMCs. Categories expressed as % of total income (net interest income + fee income). P90 represents operationally lagging institutions. RBI NBFC supervision aggregate data used for sector-wide validation.

financial_services_nonbank.label: Non-Bank Financial Services (NBFC, AMC, Fintech — India)

HR.source_note: Staff cost % of total income. HDFC AMC FY25: 13.9%, Bajaj Finance FY25: ~15% of total income, mid-tier NBFCs: 18-25%. AMCs lower (asset-light); retail NBFCs higher due to field staff.

IT.source_note: Technology spend. Gartner FS Benchmark 2024: fintech-adjacent NBFCs spend 5-8% of revenue on tech. Traditional NBFCs 2-4%. AMCs at low end (outsource to RTAs).

MARKETING.source_note: Sales & distribution, brand, customer acquisition. AMCs: ~1-2% (distributor commissions separate). Retail NBFCs: 5-9% for DSA, lead generation. Fintechs: 8-14%.

PROF_SVCS.source_note: Legal, audit, compliance advisory, actuarial. SEBI-mandated compliance costs + audit + legal for listed NBFCs and AMCs.

FACILITIES.source_note: Rent + property. Asset-light NBFCs (AMCs, fintechs) low; retail NBFCs with branch networks higher. Bajaj Finance: ~1.5% of total income.

OUTSOURCED.source_note: Business process outsourcing: collections agencies, KYC, credit bureau API costs. RBI NBFC: outsourced collections common for retail lending NBFCs.

FIN_SVCS.source_note: Bank charges, custodian fees, clearing costs. HDFC AMC: custodian and RTA fees included in administrative expenses.

INSURANCE.source_note: D&O, professional indemnity, group health. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — calibrated from NBFC compliance and insurance cost surveys.
